---
slug: integrations/third-party/true-foundry
subtitle: Trace LLM Gateway traffic from TrueFoundry AI Gateway using OpenTelemetry
---

## Overview

[TrueFoundry AI Gateway](https://www.truefoundry.com/ai-gateway) is the proxy layer that connects you to multiple LLM providers and MCP servers.

Confident AI integrates with TrueFoundry AI to trace your LLM calls across every model and provider you route through the gateway using OpenTelemetry.

## Tracing Quickstart

<Steps>

    <Step title="Create a Confident AI API key">

    Log in to your [Confident AI](https://app.confident.ai) dashboard, open your project, and go to **Settings → API Keys**. Create a new API key and store it securely, you'll use it as the `x-confident-api-key` header when configuring TrueFoundry.

    </Step>

    <Step title="Configure OTEL export in TrueFoundry">

    In the TrueFoundry dashboard, go to **AI Gateway → Controls → Settings**, scroll to **OTEL Config**, and click the edit (pencil) control.

    - Enable **Otel Traces Exporter Configuration**.
    - Select **HTTP Configuration**.
    - Set **Endpoint** to your Confident AI OTLP traces URL:

    ```bash
    https://otel.confident-ai.com/v1/traces
    ```

    <Tip>
    For users in the EU region, use the EU endpoint instead:

    ```bash
    https://eu.otel.confident-ai.com/v1/traces
    ```
    </Tip>

    - Set **Encoding** to `Json`.

    </Step>

    <Step title="Configure headers and save">

    Enable **Headers** and add the following:

    | Header                | Value                      |
    | --------------------- | -------------------------- |
    | `Content-Type`        | `application/json`         |
    | `x-confident-api-key` | `<your-confident-api-key>` |

    Replace `<your-confident-api-key>` with the key from step 1, then click **Save**.

    <Tip>
        Leave **Exclude Request Data** unchecked if you want Confident AI to receive LLM request and response payloads via the `tfy.input` and `tfy.output` span attributes. Confident AI accepts OTLP over HTTP only, gRPC is not supported.
    </Tip>

    </Step>

    <Step title="Verify traces in the Observatory">

    Send a few requests through your TrueFoundry AI Gateway, then confirm gateway traffic is flowing in TrueFoundry's **Monitor** page. In Confident AI, go to **Observability → Traces** to confirm new traces appear with latency, environment, and status details for your gateway requests.

    </Step>

</Steps>

<Note>
  This integration uses OpenTelemetry (OTEL). TrueFoundry sends traces over OTLP/HTTP to Confident AI, so no application code changes are required once the gateway exporter is configured. The TrueFoundry OTEL Config export only sends traces for the AI Gateway, it does not export OTEL metrics.
</Note>
